description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces where needed. Update all related Spring dependencies to compatible versions.
tasks.summary: Upgraded Java from 8 to 21 and Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.5. Migrated javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces (javax.persistence.*, javax.validation.*). Updated Dockerfile to eclipse-temurin:21. Applied Java 21 idioms (String.formatted(), Optional.isEmpty(), List.getFirst()). Build passed and unit tests pass.
